title: polystichum setigerum
intro: Polystichum setigerum, also known as the autumn fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. The health benefits of Polystichum setigerum include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress and anxiety, and improve overall well-being. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as a tea or tincture, and it can also be applied topically as a poultice or salve to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
